unresolved: PRIMARY AMBIGUITY (scope, not a missing edge): jackson has a parallel 'property' hierarchy (SettableBeanProperty/SettableAnyProperty and subclasses) with their OWN deserialize/deserializeAndSet/deserializeSetAndReturn methods that are NOT overrides of JsonDeserializer. I included property methods whose bodies DIRECTLY call a JsonDeserializer (e.g. MethodProperty/FieldProperty/ObjectIdValueProperty + SettableBeanProperty.deserialize, SettableAnyProperty.deserialize via _valueDeserializer.deserialize), but EXCLUDED methods that only call a property wrapper's deserialize (unchanged signature). If the fix threads a NEW parameter through the property layer too, these ALSO change: BeanDeserializer.deserializeFromObject / deserializeUsingPropertyBasedWithUnwrapped / deserializeUsingPropertyBasedWithExternalTypeId / _deserializeWithErrorWrapping; BuilderBasedDeserializer.deserializeFromObject / deserializeUsingPropertyBasedWithUnwrapped; BeanAsArrayDeserializer._deserializeUsingPropertyBased; BeanAsArrayBuilderDeserializer._deserializeUsingPropertyBased; ManagedReferenceProperty.deserializeAndSet/deserializeSetAndReturn; MergingSettableBeanProperty.deserializeAndSet/deserializeSetAndReturn; CreatorProperty.deserializeAndSet/deserializeSetAndReturn; InnerClassProperty.deserializeAndSet/deserializeSetAndReturn; ObjectIdReferenceProperty.deserializeSetAndReturn; SettableAnyProperty.deserializeAndSet (+ JsonNodeFieldAnyProperty.deserializeAndSet); ExternalTypeHandler._deserialize/_deserializeMissingToken; SettableBeanProperty.deserializeWith. They were excluded under the strict reading that only JsonDeserializer.deserialize's signature changes.

OVERLOAD AMBIGUITY: 'JsonDeserializer.deserialize' has two overloads. I assumed the change is to the 2-arg abstract deserialize(JsonParser, DeserializationContext). The 3-arg deserialize(JsonParser, DeserializationContext, T intoValue) is a separate method; I included it only where its body calls the 2-arg form (e.g. StdScalarDeserializer.deserialize, StdNodeBasedDeserializer.deserialize, and the 3-arg overloads in UntypedObjectDeserializer/PrimitiveArrayDeserializers which share the file:deserialize entry). If the 3-arg signature is ALSO changing, every 3-arg override and its callers (e.g. DefaultDeserializationContext lines 344/377, SetterlessProperty/InnerClassProperty.deserializeAndSet, DelegatingDeserializer 3-arg, MergingSettableBeanProperty.deserializeWith) would be added.

Entries like 'PrimitiveArrayDeserializers.java:deserialize' (the abstract base 3-arg merge variant calling the 2-arg) and same-named overloaded methods (deserialize 2-arg vs 3-arg in the same class) collapse to one path:method label; a fixer must update all overloads of that name in the file.
